title: system.timesync
description: SyncStateEngine transition events published by drs-server and consumed by Sg.App + DRS webapp to update sync banners/cards. One message per state transition.

scope.description: 'global' for the WS1<->WS2 link, or a variant name for a per-variant feed.

offset_ms.description: NTP offset (ms) at the time of transition.
